description: As part of project closeout, a project engineer must ensure every item in the submittal log has been reviewed and closed.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the entire submittal log for the project.

expected_outcome.value: The complete submittal log is retrieved.

nodes.task_description: Filter the log to find any submittals that are not in a 'Closed' or 'Approved' status.

expected_outcome.value: The filter returns zero items, confirming all submittals have been processed.

nodes.task_description: Generate a final submittal log report for the project archive.

expected_outcome.value: A final, complete report is generated.
